raw_text:
verdict=ESCALATE
reason=The request has a payment_rail_change action and a release ticket for the same vendor/rail token, but the callback record does not show the required rail_token field was recorded in the verification step. Under POL-VMR-7, execution requires matching action_type, vendor_id, rail_token, and release ticket; source B16-01-SRC-04 indicates a missing rail_token_field, so this should be escalated before execution.
